name: radio
title: Radio
description: A radio group for single selection from a list of mutually exclusive options.

docs.overview: Radio renders a group of mutually exclusive options with circular indicators. The selected option shows a primary-colored fill; unselected options show a muted border. Disabled options are dimmed with reduced opacity.
docs.usage: RadioGroup({ options: [{ label: 'Small', value: 'sm' }, { label: 'Medium', value: 'md' }, { label: 'Large', value: 'lg' }], value: 'md', onChange: (v) => size.set(v) })
docs.accessibility: Container uses role 'radiogroup'. Each item uses role 'radio'. Provide accessibilityLabel on the group for screen readers.

platformNotes.macos: Uses native AppKit radio button behavior through Perry.
platformNotes.ios: Uses native UIKit selection behavior through Perry.
platformNotes.linux: Uses native GTK radio button behavior through Perry.
platformNotes.windows: Uses current Perry Windows backend behavior.
platformNotes.web: Rendered as styled radio elements through Perry web target.

props.name: options
props.description: Array of radio options with label, value, and optional disabled flag

props.name: name
props.description: Group name for the radio set

props.name: accessibilityLabel
props.description: Screen reader label for the radio group

examples.title: Basic Radio Group

agent.summary: Radio group for single selection from mutually exclusive options
useWhen: Single selection from a list of options
layoutHints: Pair with Label for group heading
accessibilityChecklist: Each option has a visible label
